No One Left Behind.descriptionPost95:
When all Generators are completed:

- You heal 50/75/100% faster.
- You unhook other Survivors 50/75/100% faster.
- Whenever you unhook a Survivor, they gain 10% more Haste.
- You see the Auras of other Survivors.

No Mither.descriptionPost95:
When the trial starts, you become injured, then:

- You gain Broken.
- Your Grunts of Pain are 100% quieter.
- You leave no Pools of Blood.
- You recover 15/20/25% faster.
- You can fully recover.

A Nurse's Calling.descriptionPost95: Within 28/30/32 m of injured Survivors who are healing or being healed, you see their Auras.

Bound by Obsession.descriptionPost95:
While you are the Obsession, every 30 s, the Killer sees your Aura for 3 s.

While the Killer sees your Aura:

- You see their Aura.
- You cleanse Totems 2/4/6% faster.
- You heal 2/4/6% faster.
- You repair 2/4/6% faster.

When the trial starts, you are more likely to be the Obsession.

Off the Record.descriptionPost95:
Until all Generators are completed, whenever you are unhooked, for the next 30/35/40 s:

- You gain Endurance.
- Your Grunts of Pain are 100% quieter.
- The Killer cannot see your Aura.

Open-Handed.descriptionPost95: All Survivors see Auras that have a range from 8/12/16 m farther.

Overwhelming Presence.descriptionPost95:
Whenever a Survivor uses an item within 32 m of you, they gain Exhausted for 15 s.

Whenever a Survivor within 32 m of you gains Exhausted, you see the closest Exhausted Survivor's Aura for 2/3/4 s. Cooldown: 25 s.

Pharmacy.descriptionPost95:
Whenever you unlock a Chest, it will contain a rare Med-Kit.

You unlock Chests 75/100/125% faster.

The range at which the Killer hears you unlocking Chests is 12 m shorter.

See How They Run.descriptionPost95:
Whenever you stop chasing the Obsession, you earn 1 Token, up to 3.

For each Token, gain 3/4/5% Haste.

Whenever you attack, lose 1 Token.

Plunderer's Instinct.descriptionPost95:
Within 32/48/64 m of locked Chests and dropped items, you see their Auras.

Whenever you unlock a Chest, you are 50% more likely to find an item of higher rarity.

Poised.descriptionPost95:
The first time you start repairing each Generator, you see the Killer's Aura for 8 s.

Whenever a Generator is completed, you leave no Scratch Marks for 20/25/30 s.

Pop Goes the Weasel.descriptionPost95: Whenever you hook a Survivor, for the next 35/40/45 s, when you damage a Generator, it explodes and loses 15% more progress.

Predator.descriptionPost95: When you stop chasing a Survivor, you see their Aura for 4 s. Cooldown: 60/50/40 s.

Premonition.descriptionPost95: While the Killer is within 36 m of you and inside a 45 degree cone, whenever you look at them, you hear a sound cue. Cooldown: 60/45/30 s.

Prove Thyself.descriptionPost95: For each other Survivor within 4 m of you, all Survivors repair 6/8/10% faster.

Quick & Quiet.descriptionPost95: You hide in Lockers and vault silently. The Killer is not alerted. Cooldown: 25/20/15 s.

Rancor.descriptionPost95:
Whenever a Generator is completed:

- You are alerted to the position of all Survivors for 3 s.
- The Obsession sees your Aura for 5/4/3 s.

When all Generators are completed:

- The Obsession gains Exposed.
- You can Kill the Obsession.

Red Herring.descriptionPost95:
After you repair a Generator for at least 1 s, you see its Aura.

When you hide in a Locker, the Killer is alerted to the Generator. Cooldown: 25/20/15 s.

Remember Me.descriptionPost95:
Whenever the Obsession takes damage, you earn 1 Token, up to 3/4/5.

For each Token, Survivors who are not the Obsession open Exit Gates 30% slower.

Repressed Alliance.descriptionPost95:
You're accustomed to being hunted by malicious forces, and you've begun using it to your advantage.

Repressed Alliance activates after repairing generators for a total of 55/50/45 seconds.

When repairing a generator while the perk is active, press the Active Ability Button 1 to call upon The Entity to block the generator for 30 seconds. The perk deactivates.

This interaction is not available if other Survivors are repairing the generator.

Affected generators will be revealed by a white aura to all Survivors.

Resilience.descriptionPost95:
While injured:

- You bless and cleanse Totems 3/6/9% faster.
- You heal 3/6/9% faster.
- You open Exit Gates 3/6/9% faster.
- You repair 3/6/9% faster.
- You sabotage Hooks 3/6/9% faster.
- You unhook Survivors 3/6/9% faster.
- You unlock chests 3/6/9% faster.
- You vault 3/6/9% faster.

Appraisal.descriptionPost95:
When the trial starts, you earn 4 Tokens.

Spend 1 Token to rummage an empty Chest, up to 2 times per chest.

You rummage Chests 40/60/80% faster.

Deception.descriptionPost95:
Whenever you attempt to fast-enter a Locker:

- You do not enter the Locker.
- The Killer is alerted.
- You leave no Scratch Marks for 5 s.

Cooldown: 25/20/15 s.

Power Struggle.descriptionPost95:
While carried by the Killer, while you have at least 25/20/15% wiggle and next to an Upright Pallet, you can drop it to stun the Killer.

While downed, you see the Auras of Upright Pallets.

Fast Track.descriptionPost95:
Whenever another Survivor is hooked, you earn 1/2/3 Token(s), up to 9.

While repairing, whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, spend all Tokens. For each Token spent, the Generator gains 2% permanent progress.

Smash Hit.descriptionPost95:
Whenever you Pallet-stun the Killer:

- You gain 50% Haste for 4 s.
- You gain Exhausted for 30/25/20 s.

Self-Preservation.descriptionPost95: Whenever another Survivor is hooked, you gain Elusive for 20/25/30 s.

Counterforce.descriptionPost95:
When the trial starts, you earn 1 Token.

Whenever you cleanse a Totem, earn 1 Token, then, you see the Aura of the farthest Totem for 10/12/14 s.

For each Token, you cleanse Totems 25% faster.

Resurgence.descriptionPost95: Whenever you are unhooked, you gain 50/60/70% healing progress.

Blast Mine.descriptionPost95:
After repairing 40% of Generators, while next to a Generator, use Active Ability Button 2 to trap it for 100/110/120 s. All Survivors see that Generator's Aura for that time.

When the Killer damages that Generator, the trap explodes, then:

- They are stunned for 4 s.
- Everyone nearby looking at the detonation is blinded.

Bite the Bullet.descriptionPost95:
While healing, you and the healed Survivor make no noises or Grunts of Pain. Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check:

- You lose only 3/2/1% progress.
- The Killer is not alerted.

Flashbang.descriptionPost95:
After repairing 50/45/40% of Generators, while hiding in a Locker, use Active Ability Button 1 to craft a Flashbang.

When you use the Flashbang:

- Everyone nearby looking at the detonation is blinded.
- The Killer is alerted.

Rookie Spirit.descriptionPost95: After you hit 5/4/3 basic repair Skill Checks, while a Generator is regressing, you see its Aura.

Clairvoyance.descriptionPost95:
Whenever you bless or cleanse a Totem, while not holding an item, use the Use Item button to, for up to 10/11/12 s and within 64 m:

- See the Auras of Chests.
- See the Auras of Exit Gate Switches.
- See the Auras of Generators.
- See the Aura of the Hatch.
- See the Auras of Hooks.

Boon: Circle of Healing.descriptionPost95:
While next to a totem, use Active Ability Button 1 to bless it, creating a unique Boon Totem that combines all your Boons.

Survivors within the Boon's range:

- While healing without a Med-Kit, they heal others 50/75/100% faster.
- While injured, other Survivors see their Aura.

Boon: Shadow Step.descriptionPost95:
While next to a Totem, use Active Ability Button 1 to bless it, creating a unique Boon Totem that combines all your Boons. Survivors within the Boon's range:

- Leave no Scratch Marks.
- Their Auras cannot be seen by the Killer.

When leaving the range, this ends after 2/3/4 s.

Overcome.descriptionPost95:
Whenever you take damage:

- You retain your speed boost for 2 s longer.
- You gain Exhausted for 60/50/40 s.

Corrective Action.descriptionPost95:
When the trial starts, you earn 1/2/3 Tokens, up to 5.

Whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, earn 1 Token.

Whenever another Survivor misses a basic Skill Check, spend 1 Token:

- The missed Skill Check becomes a good Skill Check.
- You see that Survivor's Aura for 6 s.

Boon: Exponential.descriptionPost95:
While next to a totem, use Active Ability Button 1 to bless it, creating a unique Boon totem that combines all your Boons.

Downed Survivors within the Boon's range:

- Recover 90/95/100% faster.
- Can fully recover.

Parental Guidance.descriptionPost95:
Whenever you stun the Killer, for 5/6/7 s:

- You make no Grunts of Pain.
- You leave no Pools of Blood.
- You leave no Scratch Marks.

Empathic Connection.descriptionPost95:
You heal other Survivors 25/30/35% faster.

Injured Survivors see your Aura.

Boon: Dark Theory.descriptionPost95:
While next to a totem, use Active Ability Button 1 to bless it, creating a unique Boon Totem that combines all your Boons.

Survivors within the Boon's range gain 3% Haste. When leaving the range, this ends after 2/3/4 s.

Inner Focus.descriptionPost95:
Whenever the Killer damages another Survivor, you see the Killer's Aura for 6/8/10 s.

You see other Survivors' Scratch Marks.

Residual Manifest.descriptionPost95:
Whenever you blind the Killer, they gain Blindness for 20/25/30 s.

You can rummage Chests 1 time. The first time you rummage a Chest, it will contain an uncommon Flashlight.

Overzealous.descriptionPost95: Whenever you bless or cleanse a Totem, until you take damage, you repair 8/9/10% faster. If that Totem was a Hex Totem, the effect is doubled.

Wiretap.descriptionPost95:
After repairing 40% of Generators, while next to a Generator, use Active Ability Button 2 to trap it for 100/110/120 s or until the Killer damages that Generator. All Survivors see that Generator's Aura for that time.

While the Killer is within 14 m of that Generator, all Survivors see the Killer's Aura.

Reactive Healing.descriptionPost95: While injured, whenever another Survivor within 32 m of you takes damage, you gain 40/45/50% missing healing progress.

Low Profile.descriptionPost95:
When all other Survivors are downed or hooked, for 70/80/90 s:

- You make no Grunts of Pain.
- You leave no Pools of Blood.
- You leave no Scratch Marks.

Better Than New.descriptionPost95:
Whenever you finish healing another Survivor, until they take damage:

- They bless and cleanse 12/14/16% faster.
- They heal 12/14/16% faster.
- They unlock Chests 12/14/16% faster.

Reassurance.descriptionPost95: Once per Hook State, while within 6 m of a hooked Survivor, use Active Ability Button 2 to stop the sacrifice progress for 20/25/30 s.

Hyperfocus.descriptionPost95:
Whenever you hit a great basic Skill Check, you earn 1 Token, up to 6.

For each Token, basic Skill Checks:

- Appear 4% more often.
- Spin 4% faster.
- Whenever you hit a great, give 10/20/30% more progress.

Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check, hit a good Skill Check, or stop healing or repairing, lose all Tokens.

Potential Energy.descriptionPost95:
While repairing, use Active Ability Button 2 to earn Tokens instead of progress, up to 10/15/20 Tokens.

While you have at least 1 Token, Active Ability Button 2 to spend all Tokens and gain 1% progress for each Token spent.

Whenever you take damage, lose all Tokens.
